narrative: Iran closes the Strait of Hormuz following US strikes, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as WTI surges +4.19%; gold lower -0.79%; equities +0.42%; DXY +0.18%; VIX 15.0. USD/JPY holds at 162.03 as 275bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand, though options show a moderate put skew with 25d RR at -1.38. USD/CAD at 1.4164 remains decoupled from crude (z=-2.02σ) ahead of the BoC meeting. Watch BoC Rate Decision July 15 and US CPI tomorrow.
